# YYYY-MM Monthly Review

> Summarize this month in one sentence.

## Highlights

Write achievements, events, or breakthroughs worth remembering.

## What I Learned

Write the most important realizations, reading gains, or cognitive shifts from this month.

## What Went Well / What Did Not

Write what went well and what should be adjusted next month.

## Area Status

Write the status of each area: what is on track and what has been neglected.

- [[03-连接层/🌱 Area Name|Area Name]] - Status note

## Last Month's Plan vs. Reality

Write how last month's "Direction / Plan for Next Month" was executed this month: completed, partially completed, or not completed, with reasons.

## Direction for Next Month

Write what you most want to focus on next month and what you are ready to stop doing.

Write "Alignment with the yearly plan". If there is no yearly baseline, explicitly write "No yearly plan baseline".
